tasks.subject: Task 0: Graceful Shutdown
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add SIGTERM/SIGINT signal handling to `taskcast start` so the server shuts down cleanly.

**Files:**
- Modify: `rust/taskcast-cli/src/commands/start.rs`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Server responds to SIGTERM/SIGINT gracefully
- [ ] Prints shutdown message to stderr
- [ ] Existing tests pass

**Verify:** `cd rust && cargo test -p taskcast-cli && cargo build -p taskcast-cli`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["rust/taskcast-cli/src/commands/start.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cd rust && cargo test -p taskcast-cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SIGTERM/SIGINT handled", "shutdown message printed", "existing tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Core Types — ServiceManager Trait
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define ServiceManager trait, ServiceInstallOptions, ServiceStatus, create_service_manager() factory.

**Files:**
- Create: `rust/taskcast-cli/src/commands/service/manager.rs`
- Create: `rust/taskcast-cli/src/commands/service/mod.rs` (stub)
- Create: stub files for launchd, systemd, paths, health
- Modify: `rust/taskcast-cli/src/commands/mod.rs`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Trait with 6 methods
- [ ] Types with correct fields
- [ ] Factory returns correct platform impl
- [ ] Unit tests pass

**Verify:** `cd rust && cargo test -p taskcast-cli -- service::manager`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["rust/taskcast-cli/src/commands/service/manager.rs", "rust/taskcast-cli/src/commands/service/mod.rs", "rust/taskcast-cli/src/commands/mod.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cd rust && cargo test -p taskcast-cli -- service::manager", "acceptanceCriteria": ["trait defined", "types defined", "factory works", "tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Path Resolution and Config/State Helpers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement ServicePaths, ensure_config, write_state/read_state_port, get_port.

**Files:**
- Modify: `rust/taskcast-cli/src/commands/service/paths.rs`
- Modify: `rust/taskcast-cli/Cargo.toml` (add libc)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Correct paths per platform
- [ ] Auto-creates default config
- [ ] State file round-trip
- [ ] Port resolution priority

**Verify:** `cd rust && cargo test -p taskcast-cli -- service::paths`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["rust/taskcast-cli/src/commands/service/paths.rs", "rust/taskcast-cli/Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cd rust && cargo test -p taskcast-cli -- service::paths", "acceptanceCriteria": ["platform paths correct", "config auto-creation", "state roundtrip", "port resolution"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: macOS launchd Implementation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement LaunchdServiceManager — plist generation, launchctl commands, status parsing.

**Files:**
- Modify: `rust/taskcast-cli/src/commands/service/launchd.rs`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Correct plist XML for all option combos
- [ ] launchctl bootstrap/bootout/list commands
- [ ] PID parsing from launchctl output
- [ ] NotInstalled when plist missing

**Verify:** `cd rust && cargo test -p taskcast-cli -- service::launchd`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["rust/taskcast-cli/src/commands/service/launchd.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cd rust && cargo test -p taskcast-cli -- service::launchd", "acceptanceCriteria": ["plist generation", "launchctl commands", "PID parsing", "NotInstalled check"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Linux systemd Implementation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement SystemdServiceManager — unit file generation, systemctl commands, status parsing.

**Files:**
- Modify: `rust/taskcast-cli/src/commands/service/systemd.rs`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Correct unit file for all option combos
- [ ] systemctl --user commands
- [ ] Status parsing from systemctl show
- [ ] NotInstalled when unit file missing

**Verify:** `cd rust && cargo test -p taskcast-cli -- service::systemd`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["rust/taskcast-cli/src/commands/service/systemd.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cd rust && cargo test -p taskcast-cli -- service::systemd", "acceptanceCriteria": ["unit file generation", "systemctl commands", "status parsing", "NotInstalled check"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Health Check
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement health check polling and detail fetching.

**Files:**
- Modify: `rust/taskcast-cli/src/commands/service/health.rs`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] poll_health polls at 500ms intervals
- [ ] Returns true on 2xx, false on timeout
- [ ] fetch_health_detail parses uptime/storage
- [ ] format_uptime displays correctly

**Verify:** `cd rust && cargo test -p taskcast-cli -- service::health`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["rust/taskcast-cli/src/commands/service/health.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cd rust && cargo test -p taskcast-cli -- service::health", "acceptanceCriteria": ["polling works", "timeout returns false", "detail parsing", "uptime formatting"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Service Command Handlers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement orchestration in service/mod.rs — run(), install, start, stop, restart, status handlers.

**Files:**
- Modify: `rust/taskcast-cli/src/commands/service/mod.rs`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] ServiceArgs/ServiceCommands Clap parsing
- [ ] run() dispatches correctly
- [ ] install validates port, creates config, writes state
- [ ] start/stop check status first
- [ ] status shows detail info

**Verify:** `cd rust && cargo test -p taskcast-cli -- service::tests`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["rust/taskcast-cli/src/commands/service/mod.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cd rust && cargo test -p taskcast-cli -- service::tests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Clap parsing", "dispatch", "install flow", "pre-checks", "status detail"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: CLI Wiring — main.rs Integration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire service subcommand into main.rs, replace placeholders, add aliases.

**Files:**
- Modify: `rust/taskcast-cli/src/main.rs`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] service subcommand group works
- [ ] daemon/stop/status aliases delegate correctly
- [ ] Old placeholder behavior removed
- [ ] All CLI parsing tests pass

**Verify:** `cd rust && cargo test -p taskcast-cli && cargo build -p taskcast-cli`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["rust/taskcast-cli/src/main.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cd rust && cargo test -p taskcast-cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["service subcommand works", "aliases work", "placeholders removed", "all tests pass"]}
```
